description_long: This is a large, stately residential house set within a spacious, landscaped property surrounded by trees and greenery. The main building features a symmetrical facade with a prominent central entrance, flanked by multiple wings and auxiliary structures, including a detached garage and a pool house. The roof is primarily gabled with dark shingles, and the exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted masonry. The property includes a tennis court, a swimming pool, and manicured lawns, all enclosed by a perimeter fence. Windows are arranged in regular, symmetrical rows, and the main entryway is accentuated by a portico with columns and steps leading up to the door. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial Revival and Neoclassical architectural styles, emphasizing grandeur and formality.
description: A grand, light-colored two-story house with a gabled dark roof, symmetrical windows, and a columned entryway, set on a landscaped estate with a pool, tennis court, and detached structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a portico, central driveway, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and auxiliary buildings, with the tennis court visible to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the house, tennis court, and dense tree line along the property edge.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back porch, pool, and the arrangement of trees and open lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central portico with columns, steps, and a prominent main door
